summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of NextHeir inheritance platform iteration 3. Verified the 'Failed to Save Scenario' bug fix, tested full scenario creation flow with fresh user registration, confirmed non-zero distribution percentages, validated AI chat functionality, and tested all edge cases. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally intercepts button clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Chat functionality works, just occasional click interception

passed_tests: Backend: Fresh user registration (testuser072455@test.com)
Backend: Cookie-based authentication working correctly
Backend: ID preservation - frontend UUIDs correctly preserved
Backend: Scenario creation with 2 assets and 2 family members
Backend: Simulation produces non-zero distribution (Alice: 55.61%, Bob: 44.39%)
Backend: Total estate value calculation (1,025,000)
Backend: High fairness score (88.8/100)
Backend: AI chat with Gemini 3 Flash (2927 character response)
Backend: Edge case single asset/member (100% allocation)
Backend: Compare scenarios AI chat functionality
Backend: All CRUD operations on scenarios
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly
Frontend: User registration flow with fresh user
Frontend: 3-step scenario creation wizard (Assets → Family → Distribution)
Frontend: Asset form with type selection, pricing, ownership percentage
Frontend: Family member form with relationship selection
Frontend: Distribution allocation with percentage validation
Frontend: Simulation loading overlay and completion
Frontend: Results page with all components (Total Estate: 840,000, Fairness: 97.1/100)
Frontend: Pie chart displays correct non-zero percentages (Alice: 51.43%, Bob: 48.57%)
Frontend: 5-year projection bar chart renders correctly
Frontend: Distribution breakdown cards with member details
Frontend: No 'No valid distribution data' fallback message when data exists
Frontend: AI chat panel opens and displays quick questions
Frontend: Edit scenario loads with existing data
Frontend: Dashboard navigation and scenario listing
Frontend: Compare scenarios page loads
Frontend: Logout functionality redirects to landing page
Integration: Asset/member IDs properly preserved across frontend-backend
Integration: Simulation results correctly calculated and displayed
Integration: Authentication cookies maintained across requests
